title: How can I change "Item" title.....the header of the first column
excerpt:
Hi there, is there a way to change the name of the first column, which defaults to “item”? 
In another board I set up, I have it titled project, but in my new board I keep getting a message that says this title cannot be…

posts.author: michaelanthony (Michael Anthony)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, is there a way to change the name of the first column, which defaults to “item”?

In another board I set up, I have it titled project, but in my new board I keep getting a message that says this title cannot be edited.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @michaelanthony

Welcome to the community! You can change the title by changing the “item terminology”. This is a per board setting and can be found under the 3-dot menu in the upper right corner > Board settings > Change Item terminology

Have fun

posts.author: CEC (Carey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @basdebruin. The only problem is that in this custom option, you can not have caps and non caps where you want them. It forces the first letter to be capped and wont cap anything else. Can this be fixed?
